requirements.task_name: Register for the earliest lead climbing safety workshop in Colorado under $80
requirements.task_description: Find upcoming education events, filter to lead climbing safety workshops located in Colorado costing $80 or less, sort by date, and complete registration for the earliest qualifying workshop.

requirements.task_name: Purchase a 1-year professional routesetter membership under $120 with auto-renew turned off
requirements.task_description: Go to membership plans, compare options, select the Professional Routesetter plan with a 1-year term priced under $120, disable auto-renewal, and complete the on-site payment form.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark 3 advanced anchor-building articles published after January 1, 2023
requirements.task_description: Search the resource library for anchor-building content, filter to advanced-level articles published after January 1, 2023, sort by recency, and add the first three matching articles to your reading list.

requirements.task_name: Add 2 Denver-area youth-program gyms within 20 miles to your Favorite Gyms list
requirements.task_description: Use the gym directory to find member gyms within 20 miles of Denver, Colorado that offer youth programs, sort by distance, and add the first two gyms shown to your Favorite Gyms list.

requirements.task_name: Apply to a head routesetter job in the Pacific region with salary at least $55,000 using a saved profile
requirements.task_description: Search the job board for head routesetter positions in the Pacific region offering salaries of $55,000 or more, sort by newest postings, and submit an application to the first qualifying job using an existing saved profile.

requirements.task_name: Register a youth climber for the cheapest May 2025 bouldering competition within 100 miles of Seattle
requirements.task_description: Find bouldering competitions scheduled in May 2025 within 100 miles of Seattle, sort by registration fee, and register a youth participant for the competition with the lowest registration price using the basic tier without add-ons.

requirements.task_name: Enroll in an intermediate coaching course rated 4.5+ stars and under 8 weeks, then add it to your learning plan
requirements.task_description: Browse education courses, filter to intermediate-level courses shorter than 8 weeks with ratings of at least 4.5 stars, sort by highest rating, enroll in the top-ranked course, and add it to your personal learning plan.

requirements.task_name: Volunteer for an online evening safety standards committee and select at least 2 interest areas
requirements.task_description: Find a safety standards committee that meets online in the evenings, open its detail page, and submit a volunteer interest form selecting at least two specific areas of interest.
